why: Mexico is a marquee match 5.8km away; peak around 17:00 (+70%). Aggregate visitor demand skews en, es, ar-language. Prep inventory, staffing, hours and your Google profile now.
soccer_match_day_actions: Post a 'World Cup match-day hours' update on your Google Business Profile
Add bilingual (EN/ES) match-day signage + a QR menu for faster ordering
Stock extra bottled water & non-alcoholic drinks for families/kids
Staff up for the pre- and post-match surge windows — and avoid price gouging
Extend hours into the post-match wave and offer a late-night food bundle
Add a pickup/family line and a backup plan (to-go / overflow) — crowd risk is high
